sentences.target: Le sol est luisant après le ménage.
sentences.reading: /lə sɔl ɛ lɥizɑ̃ apʁɛ lə menaʒ/

translations.fr: Le sol est luisant après le ménage.
translations.ipa: /lə sɔl ɛ lɥizɑ̃ apʁɛ lə menaʒ/
translations.en: The floor is shiny after cleaning.
translations.es: El suelo brilla después de la limpieza.
translations.de: Der Boden glänzt nach dem Putzen.
translations.it: Il pavimento brilla dopo la pulizia.
translations.yue: 抹完地之後，地板好閃令令。
translations.pt: O chão brilha após a limpeza.
translations.vi: Sàn nhà sáng bóng sau khi dọn dẹp.
translations.nl: De vloer glanst na het schoonmaken.
translations.hu: A padló fényes a takarítás után.
translations.hi: सफाई के बाद फर्श चमकता है.
translations.el: Το πάτωμα γυαλίζει μετά το καθάρισμα.
translations.ja: 掃除の後、床がピカピカだ。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, masculine singular, determiner introducing the noun 'sol' as a specific referent.
Common noun; syntactic subject of the clause; denotes the floor/ground.
Copular auxiliary (3rd person singular present) linking the subject 'sol' to the predicate adjective 'luisant'.
Adjective used predicatively; complement of the copula describing the subject's state (glossy/shiny).
Preposition introducing a temporal complement, marking the time relation ('after').
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner for 'ménage'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'après'; denotes housework/cleaning as a temporal reference.

sentences.target: Ton vélo est luisant sous le soleil.
sentences.reading: /tɔ̃ velo ɛ lɥizɑ̃ su lə sɔlɛj/

translations.fr: Ton vélo est luisant sous le soleil.
translations.ipa: /tɔ̃ velo ɛ lɥizɑ̃ su lə sɔlɛj/
translations.en: Your bike is shiny under the sun.
translations.es: Tu bicicleta brilla bajo el sol.
translations.de: Dein Fahrrad glänzt in der Sonne.
translations.it: La tua bici brilla al sole.
translations.zh-Hans: 你的自行车在阳光下闪闪发亮。
translations.yue: 你部單車喺陽光下閃閃發亮。
translations.vi: Xe đạp của bạn sáng bóng dưới nắng.
translations.nl: Je fiets glanst in de zon.
translations.hi: तुम्हारी साइकिल धूप में चमकती है.
translations.el: Το ποδήλατό σου γυαλίζει στον ήλιο.
translations.id: Sepedamu berkilau di bawah sinar matahari.
translations.cs: Tvoje kolo se leskne na slunci.
translations.ja: あなたの自転車は太陽の下で輝いている。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (2nd person singular), masculine singular; modifies 'vélo' to mark possession.
Common noun; syntactic subject of the clause; denotes a bicycle.
Copular auxiliary (3rd person singular present) linking the subject 'vélo' to the predicate adjective 'luisant'.
Predicate adjective describing the subject's appearance.
Preposition introducing a locative complement; indicates spatial relation ('under').
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner for 'soleil'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'sous'; denotes the sun (locative complement).

sentences.target: Il porte un blouson luisant aujourd'hui.

translations.fr: Il porte un blouson luisant aujourd'hui.
translations.en: He’s wearing a shiny jacket today.
translations.de: Er trägt heute eine glänzende Jacke.
translations.ko: 오늘 그는 반짝이는 재킷을 입고 있다.
translations.zh-Hans: 他今天穿着一件亮闪闪的夹克。
translations.yue: 佢今日著住件閃令令嘅外套。
translations.pt: Hoje ele está usando uma jaqueta brilhante.
translations.vi: Hôm nay anh ấy mặc một chiếc áo khoác sáng bóng.
translations.nl: Hij draagt vandaag een glanzende jas.
translations.hi: आज वह चमकदार जैकेट पहने हुए है.
translations.pl: Dziś ma na sobie błyszczącą kurtkę.
translations.nb: Han har på seg en blank jakke i dag.
translations.id: Hari ini dia memakai jaket mengilap.
translations.sv: Han har på sig en blank jacka i dag.
translations.cs: Dnes má na sobě lesklou bundu.
translations.da: Han har en blank jakke på i dag.
translations.ja: 彼は今日、光沢のあるジャケットを着ている。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular masculine; subject of the clause.
Main verb (3rd person singular present); expresses the action of wearing/carrying.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner for 'blouson'.
Common noun; direct object of 'porte'; denotes a jacket.
Attributive adjective modifying 'blouson'; describes its glossy appearance.
Temporal adverb; modifies the clause to indicate the time ('today').

sentences.target: Cette pomme a un côté luisant.

translations.fr: Cette pomme a un côté luisant.
translations.en: This apple has a shiny side.
translations.es: Esta manzana tiene un lado brillante.
translations.de: Dieser Apfel hat eine glänzende Seite.
translations.it: Questa mela ha un lato lucido.
translations.zh-Hans: 这个苹果有一面很光亮。
translations.yue: 呢個蘋果有一邊好光亮。
translations.ru: У этого яблока одна сторона блестит.
translations.pt: Esta maçã tem um lado brilhante.
translations.tr: Bu elmanın parlak bir yanı var.
translations.vi: Quả táo này có một bên sáng bóng.
translations.nl: Deze appel heeft een glanzende kant.
translations.uk: У цього яблука блищить один бік.
translations.hu: Ennek az almának van egy fényes oldala.
translations.hi: इस सेब की एक तरफ चमकदार है.
translations.el: Το μήλο αυτό έχει μια γυαλιστερή πλευρά.
translations.nb: Dette eplet har en blank side.
translations.id: Apel ini memiliki satu sisi yang mengilap.
translations.sv: Detta äpple har en blank sida.
translations.ro: Acest măr are o parte lucioasă.
translations.da: Dette æble har en blank side.
translations.ja: このりんごは片側がつやつやしている。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner, feminine singular; specifies the noun 'pomme'.
Common noun; syntactic subject of the clause; denotes an apple.
Main verb (3rd person singular present); expresses possession.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner for 'côté'.
Common noun; direct object of 'a'; denotes a side/aspect.
Attributive adjective modifying 'côté'; describes the side's glossy/shiny quality.
